macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Major Indices Rally Led by Tech and AI News
items.summary: The Dow Jones rose 0.76% to 49,147, S&P 500 gained 0.77%-0.81% to around 6,890, and Nasdaq climbed 1.04%-1.41% to 22,863, driven by positive AI developments including Meta's planned billions in AI infrastructure from AMD and rebounds in Nvidia and Microsoft.

items.title: Nvidia Earnings Set for Release After Market Close
items.summary: Nvidia's highly anticipated earnings report is due after the close on February 25, potentially influencing the next phase of market rallies amid recent struggles in tech leaders.

items.title: Goldman Sachs Raises S&P 500 Pullback Risk to 28%
items.summary: Goldman Sachs increased its estimate for a larger S&P 500 drawdown to 28% from 23%, citing waning equity momentum, elevated options activity, and fears of AI-driven software disruptions.

items.title: St. Louis Fed President: Fed Funds Rate Near Neutral
items.summary: St. Louis Fed President Alberto Musalem stated the fed funds rate is near neutral and well-positioned to balance employment and inflation risks.

items.title: Nifty 50 Ends Up 58 Points Amid Selling Pressure
items.summary: India's Nifty 50 rebounded 58 points on February 25 but faced selling pressure, staying range-bound between 25,300-25,900; India VIX fell 4.68% to 13.49.

items.title: Geopolitics Continues to Dominate Market Movements
items.summary: Geopolitical updates are driving larger market reactions than economic data releases, overshadowing fundamentals.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Rebounds to $66K Amid Jane Street Lawsuit and Double-Bottom Bounce
items.summary: Bitcoin recovered to around $66,000 after hitting a double bottom at $63,000, with potential for breakout above $70,000 if confirmed. The rebound coincides with Terraform Labs suing Jane Street for insider trading.

items.title: 21Shares Launches Strategy Yield ETP (STRC) Offering Bitcoin-Backed High Yield
items.summary: 21Shares announced the launch of its first equity-linked ETP, STRC, providing exposure to Strategy Inc.'s bitcoin-backed preferred security with 11.25% monthly yield. The product lists on Euronext Amsterdam on February 26, targeting European investors.

items.title: Bitcoin Nears $70,000 as Risk Appetite Returns to Crypto Markets
items.summary: Bitcoin approached $70,000, ending a three-session losing streak amid improving risk sentiment and modest stock gains. Despite this, it's down nearly 50% from its all-time high of $127,000.

items.title: Ethereum Surges Above $2,000, Solana Forms Triple Bottom Targeting $150
items.summary: Ethereum reclaimed $2,000 with bulls eyeing $2,100-$2,300 for a sustained rebound. Solana formed a triple bottom and aims to break $91-$105 resistance toward $150.

items.title: KBC Bank Partners Crypto Finance to Launch Crypto Trading Services
items.summary: KBC Bank collaborated with Crypto Finance to introduce cryptocurrency trading services, marking one of February's top fintech launches.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: LLMs Enable Large-Scale Deanonymization of Online Users
items.summary: Researchers have demonstrated that large language models can automatically identify anonymous users across platforms like Hacker News, Reddit, and LinkedIn with 67% success rate, fundamentally changing online privacy risks by automating what previously required manual verification.

items.title: Nvidia Posts Record $68.1 Billion Quarterly Revenue, Signals Shift to Agentic AI
items.summary: Nvidia reported record Q4 fiscal 2026 revenue of $68.1 billion, up 73% year-over-year, with CEO Jensen Huang highlighting three structural platform shifts including the emerging transition to agentic AI requiring new investment layers.

items.title: AI Skills Emerge as Hardest-to-Find Competencies in Asia Pacific and Middle East
items.summary: ManpowerGroup's 2026 Global Talent Shortage Survey reveals that 71% of APME employers struggle to fill roles, with AI Model & Application Development (27%) and AI Literacy (26%) ranking as the most difficult skills to find.

items.title: Multi-Institutional Project Receives $800K Grant to Create Historical AI Language Models
items.summary: Researchers from Cornell, University of Illinois, University of British Columbia, and McGill University received an $800,000 Humanities and AI Virtual Institute award to develop language models representing different historical periods and cultural perspectives.

items.title: Agentic AI and Real-Time Data Transform Mining Operations
items.summary: Industry analysis highlights how agentic AI systems combined with real-time data integration can optimize mining operations through dynamic route adjustments, predictive maintenance, and autonomous decision-making, addressing the current gap where 60% of mining professionals lack sufficient data for decisions.

items.title: NWN Announces Enhanced Intelligent Cloud Services for Enterprise AI Adoption
items.summary: NWN, an AI-enabled managed services provider, unveiled major enhancements to its Intelligent Cloud services combining AI-powered managed services with unified visibility and cloud modernization across AWS and Azure environments.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: HAMSTER Releases Arcade Archives Rave Racer on Multiple Platforms
items.summary: HAMSTER Corporation announced the digital release of 'Arcade Archives Rave Racer' and 'Arcade Archives 2 Rave Racer' on February 26, 2026, for Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 4/5, Nintendo Switch 2, and Xbox Series X|S, priced at $14.99 and $16.99 respectively.

items.title: Arc System Works Takes Over Guilty Gear Strive Publishing Rights in EMEA and Asia
items.summary: Starting February 26, 2026, publishing rights for Guilty Gear Strive in Europe, Middle East, Africa, and Asia transfer from Bandai Namco to developer Arc System Works, with no impact on player data or upcoming updates.

items.title: Minimap Hosts First Indie Game Showcase During Steam Next Fest
items.summary: Minimap announced its inaugural Indie Game Showcase on February 26, 2026, kicking off the opening week of Steam Next Fest with 25 featured titles.

items.title: French Publisher Nacon Files for Insolvency Ahead of Showcase
items.summary: Nacon, a French video game publisher, filed for insolvency just one week before its planned Nacon Connect games showcase.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Samsung Unveils Galaxy Buds4 Series at Galaxy Unpacked 2026
items.summary: Samsung Electronics launched the Galaxy Buds4 series on February 25 in San Francisco, featuring a bezel-less woofer for 20% larger vibrating surface, ultra-high-resolution 24-bit/96kHz audio, head gestures for hands-free control, and seamless Galaxy ecosystem integration.

items.title: Nubank Secures OCC Approval to Advance US Launch
items.summary: Brazilian digital bank Nubank received approval from the US Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) to proceed with its US market entry, marking a key step in its international expansion.

items.title: KBC Bank Launches Crypto Trading Services with Crypto Finance
items.summary: KBC Bank partnered with Crypto Finance to introduce cryptocurrency trading services, expanding its offerings in the digital asset space.

items.title: JN Bank UK Relaunches as thisbank After Rebrand
items.summary: JN Bank UK completed its rebranding to thisbank, aiming to refresh its identity and services in the competitive banking market.

items.title: Nvidia Leads Tech Stock Rally on Wall Street
items.summary: Nvidia's stock rose 1.4% ahead of its earnings report, which beat expectations with projected $78 billion revenue for the quarter, powering gains in the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq amid ongoing AI spending concerns.
